title: Carmen Jones
overview: In this musical set in an all-Black army camp, civilian parachute maker and "hot bundle" Carmen Jones is desired by many of the men. Naturally, she wants Joe, who's engaged to sweet Cindy Lou and about to go into pilot training for the Korean War.

trailers.title: Carmen Jones (1954) Clip | Out on BFI Blu-ray 19 September | BFI
